title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Inanna and An
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Inanna and An.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Inanna and An.

translation.text: From 'Inanna and An': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
